expectations.text: Review does NOT include a complexity/split advisory
expectations.evidence: No complexity advisory or split suggestion present. Review correctly treats this as a small 4-file change.

expectations.text: Review does not flag breaking changes
expectations.evidence: The review explicitly states 'Breaking changes: None — hints was not part of the exported public API surface.' The UmbBlockElementManager.hints rename is discussed but correctly dismissed as non-breaking because it's not in the public exports.
The review ends with '## Request Changes' and states 'Critical and important issues must be addressed first.' This is driven by the root tab hint badge bug finding.
Review is 47 lines, well under the 200 line limit.

expectations.text: Review does not flag purely cosmetic/stylistic issues (formatting, whitespace, naming conventions, comment grammar, code style preferences) unless they affect performance or rendering
expectations.evidence: All findings are functional: the root tab hint badge bug, type incompatibility with 'as any' cast, unreachable throw guard, and type mismatch. No cosmetic/stylistic issues flagged.
